title: [Soup´s] Knight Armor
description: Small, knight-themed tweaks regard the chestplaate and helmet of almost all armor sets.
body:
An subtle texture pack the only tweaks _some_ of the default armor sets in order to make them more medieval-like and similar to knights. This pack focuses on turning to normal minecraft helmet into more of a helm.

As of the moment, this is **vanilla only** ¯^¯"

This pack if heavily inspired by https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spryzeens-knight-armor ^O^
